import io
import string

fn main() -> Unit
  let input = io.read_to_end()
  let n = string.len(input)
  mut nums = [0, 0]
  mut idx = 0
  mut i = 0
  mut cur = 0
  mut in_num = false
  while i < n
    match string.byte_at(input, i)
    when Some(b)
      if b >= 48 and b <= 57
        cur = cur * 10 + (b - 48)
        in_num = true
      else
        if in_num
          if idx < 2
            nums = [if idx == 0 then_unused_placeholder(cur) else nums.get(0).ok_or(0).ok_value(), if idx == 1 then_unused_placeholder(cur) else 0]
          end
          in_num = false
          cur = 0
          idx = idx + 1
        end
      end
    when None
      i = i
    end
    i = i + 1
  end
  print("gcd=0")
end

fn then_unused_placeholder(_ x: Int) -> Int
  x
end
